## Checklist

- [ ] `go test -race ./...` and `go vet ./...` pass
- [ ] Code is `gofmt`-clean
- [ ] Docs updated (README / IMPLEMENTATION) if behavior or config changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased`
- [ ] Deployment contract (template parameters / env vars) is backward compatible, or the break is called out
